scripts.build: npm run check:environment-capabilities && vite build && node scripts/prepare-pages-build.mjs && node scripts/check-build-chunks.mjs
scripts.lint: eslint src functions server scripts tests react-tests
scripts.test:api: node --test tests/environment-capabilities.test.mjs tests/hr-management-migration.test.mjs tests/hr-management-api.test.mjs tests/environment-readiness-api.test.mjs tests/deployed-readiness.test.mjs tests/platform-credential-crypto.test.mjs tests/platform-credential-storage.test.mjs tests/platform-credential-resolution.test.mjs tests/platform-connections-api.test.mjs tests/production-data-access.test.mjs tests/local-production-data-client.test.mjs tests/shared-state.test.mjs tests/platform-api.test.mjs tests/integration-profiles-api.test.mjs tests/collaboration-api.test.mjs tests/collaboration-dingtalk.test.mjs tests/brand-content-api.test.mjs tests/supply-chain-api.test.mjs tests/data-center-api.test.mjs tests/ecommerce-operations-api.test.mjs tests/performance-management-api.test.mjs tests/local-supply-server.test.mjs tests/local-data-center-server.test.mjs tests/local-collaboration-server.test.mjs tests/dingtalk-approval-sync.test.mjs tests/dingtalk-api.test.mjs tests/dingtalk-org.test.mjs tests/dingtalk-org-routes.test.mjs tests/dingtalk-sync.test.mjs tests/dingtalk-todo-update.test.mjs tests/dingtalk-todo-list.test.mjs tests/dws-todo-preview.test.mjs tests/dingtalk-web-auth.test.mjs tests/dingtalk-group-auth.test.mjs tests/dingtalk-groups.test.mjs
scripts.test: npm run test:react && npm run test:api
